meaning: n.呼吸者,喘息者,剧烈的运动
examples: Tell me when you need a breather.
Relax and take a breather whenever you feel that you need one.
It would be nice to get a breather.
She adopted a baby boy soon after and took a small breather from acting.
And for a simple guided relaxation program, check out Tactical Breather, from the same group.
